title: Project Skillful Actor state into HRI and self-hosting proof
description: Expose actor skill packet state in the Human Recognition Interface and commit one self-hosting proof chain for TASK-048. The operator must see which actor is assigned, what skill packet is active, what is blocked, what council reviewed, and which benchmark evidence proves the assignment quality.
triage_notes: TASK-054 is the active v5.0 frontier after TASK-053 completed negative Skillful Actor benchmarks. [prioritized]
